dashboard.label: pfSense IP Block
dashboard.description: pfBlockerNG IP block visibility and investigations.

search.query: `pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | stats count by src_ip | sort - count | head 200
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | stats count by feed_name | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | stats count by aliasname | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | stats count by protocol | sort - count
`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | stats count by geoip | sort - count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | addinfo | stats count as blocks max(info_min_time) as info_min_time max(info_max_time) as info_max_time | eval duration_minutes=(info_max_time-info_min_time)/60 | eval blocks_per_min=if(duration_minutes>0, round(blocks/duration_minutes,2), 0) | fields blocks_per_min

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats dc(src_ip) as clients

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats dc(dst_ip) as dest_ips

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | timechart span=5m count as blocks

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count as blocks by geoip | sort - blocks | head 15

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dst_ip, dest_ip, dest), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval dest_ip_label=dest_display | stats count as blocks by dest_ip_label | rename dest_ip_label as dst_ip | sort - blocks | head 20

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dst_ip, dest_ip, dest), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval src_ip_label=src_display | stats count as blocks by src_ip_label | rename src_ip_label as src_ip | sort - blocks | head 20

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval dest_port_norm=coalesce(dst_port, dest_port, dport) | `pfsense_port_labels` | stats count as blocks by dest_port_label | rename dest_port_label as dst_port | sort - blocks | head 15

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dst_ip, dest_ip, dest), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval dest_ip_label=dest_display | stats count as blocks min(_time) as first_seen by dest_ip_label dest_ip_norm | lookup pfsense_known_iplog_dests_prev7d dest_ip_norm OUTPUT last_seen as history_last_seen | where isnull(history_last_seen) AND blocks>=5 | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%F %T") | sort - blocks | head 20 | fields dest_ip_label blocks first_seen | rename dest_ip_label as dest_ip

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | stats count as blocks by feed_name | sort - blocks | head 15

`pfsense_index` sourcetype=pfsense:iplog | eval client_tok=if("$client$"="", "*", "$client$"), feed_tok=if("$feed$"="", "*", "$feed$"), alias_tok=if("$alias$"="", "*", "$alias$"), dir_tok=if("$direction$"="", "*", "$direction$"), proto_tok=if("$protocol$"="", "*", "$protocol$"), geo_tok=if("$geo$"="", "*", "$geo$"), dup_tok=if("$dup_status$"="", "*", "$dup_status$") | search dst_ip="$dest_ip$" | where (client_tok="*" OR src_ip=client_tok) AND (feed_tok="*" OR feed_name=feed_tok) AND (alias_tok="*" OR aliasname=alias_tok) AND (dir_tok="*" OR direction=dir_tok) AND (proto_tok="*" OR protocol=proto_tok) AND (geo_tok="*" OR geoip=geo_tok) AND (dup_tok="*" OR duplicate_event_status=dup_tok) | eval src_ip_norm=src_ip, dest_ip_norm=coalesce(dst_ip, dest_ip, dest), src_display=src_ip_norm, dest_display=dest_ip_norm | `pfsense_ip_labels` | eval src_ip_label=src_display, dest_ip_label=dest_display | eval event_epoch=coalesce(strptime(date_timestamp." ".date_year,"%b %e %H:%M:%S %Y"), _time) | sort 0 - event_epoch | eval event_time=strftime(event_epoch,"%F %T") | table event_time src_ip_label dest_ip_label dst_port protocol geoip feed_name aliasname resolved_hostname duplicate_event_status | rename src_ip_label as src_ip dest_ip_label as dst_ip
